QuestionStats.title: Question Statistics
QuestionStats.description: Tracks how many times a question has been shown and skipped.

viewCount.description: Number of times the question was shown to the user.

skipCount.description: Number of times the question was skipped by the user.

mastery.description: Mastery score from 0 to 10, judged by Jeff Dean.

updatedAt.description: Last time these stats were updated.
